scripts.composer:install: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme && composer install'
scripts.lint:php: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme && vendor/bin/phpcs'
scripts.lint:php:fix: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme && vendor/bin/phpcbf'
scripts.lint:php:syntax: npx wp-env run cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme && find . \( -path "./dist" -o -path "./vendor" \) -prune -o -name "*.php" -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l'
scripts.seed:blog: npx wp-env run cli wp eval-file /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme/scripts/seed-blog-content.php
scripts.theme:check: rm -rf dist && npx wp-env run cli wp eval-file /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme/scripts/run-theme-check.php
scripts.theme:test-install: npx wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'rm -rf /tmp/eumilitar-wp-clean && mkdir -p /tmp/eumilitar-wp-clean && tar -C /var/www/html --exclude="./wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme" -cf - . | tar -C /tmp/eumilitar-wp-clean -xf - && wp --path=/tmp/eumilitar-wp-clean theme install /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme/dist/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme.zip --force --activate && wp --path=/tmp/eumilitar-wp-clean theme status eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme'
scripts.test:static: rm -rf coverage && npm run build && npm run lint:php:syntax && npm run lint:php && npm run theme:check
scripts.test:php: npx wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme && vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist'
scripts.test:php:coverage: npx wp-env run tests-cli bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/themes/eumilitar-neo-brutalism-wordpress-theme && mkdir -p coverage/php/html && phpdbg -qrr vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist --coverage-clover coverage/php/clover.xml --coverage-html coverage/php/html' && node scripts/summarize-php-coverage.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:php && npm run test:e2e
scripts.validate: rm -rf coverage && npm run build && npm run composer:install && npm run lint:php:syntax && npm run lint:php && npm run theme:check && npm run theme:zip && npm run theme:validate-zip && npm run theme:test-install
